market_brief.summary_en: Markets closed in a MIXED risk regime (48.8/100) with SPY and QQQ both at 6-day distribution (DANGER) and fearful social sentiment.
key_themes_en: SPY and QQQ distribution at 6 days (DANGER)
Bitcoin at $59,620.51, down 0.17% today and 5.72% over five days
market_brief.watch_points_en: Watch MU post close at $1,131.00 after -6.69% move and TSM at $431.30.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $432.35 with all EMAs above price and golden cross intact near 52-week high of $476.68. Setup quality strong with Stage2 6/7 and RS 84.7 in confirmed uptrend. Strong earnings growth, AI demand and heavy bullish options flow underpin optimistic sentiment.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSM이 $432.35에 마감하며 모든 이평선 위와 골든크로스 유지, 52주 고점 $476.68 근처. Stage2 6/7 RS 84.7 확인된 상승추세로 셋업 견고. 강한 실적 성장 AI 수요와 강세 옵션 플로우가 낙관 심리를 뒷받침.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: RSI decline divergence, support at EMA21 $431.07

symbol_briefs.brief_en: NVDA closed at $192.53 below EMAs in downtrend structure with Stage2 at 3/7 and RS 49.6. Price near 52-week high of $236.23 shows 18.5% pullback with volume contraction. Growing caution over competition balanced by attractive valuations.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: NVDA $192.53에 마감하며 이평선 아래 다운트렌드 Stage2 3/7 RS 49.6. 52주 고점 $236.23 대비 18.5% 조정 거래량 수축. 경쟁 심화 우려와 밸류에이션 매력 공존.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Consolidation above EMA200 $188.74 for energy build

symbol_briefs.brief_en: META closed at $550.25 below all EMAs in downtrend with Stage2 2/7 and RS 29.0. 30.7% below 52-week high of $794.01 shows continued distribution. Recent pullback viewed as buying opportunity at 17-21x forward P/E with strong ad revenue growth.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: META $550.25에 마감하며 모든 이평선 아래 다운트렌드 Stage2 2/7 RS 29.0. 52주 고점 $794.01 대비 30.7% 분배 지속. 17-21x P/E와 광고 매출 성장으로 매수 기회 인식.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Stabilization above EMA200 $633.06 unlikely near term

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSLA closed at $379.71 below EMAs in downtrend with Stage2 5/7 and RS 29.4. 23.9% below 52-week high of $498.96 with volume contraction. Retail frustration with weak YTD performance dominates fearful sentiment.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Consolidation above EMA200 $396.23 for potential relief
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: EMA200 $396.23 위 안정 시 반등 가능

symbol_briefs.brief_en: PLTR closed at $112.93 below all EMAs in distribution with Stage2 0/7 and RS 0.0. 45.6% below 52-week high of $207.59 shows severe damage. Japan defense AI contract evaluation and Michael Burry short cover on reports providing fresh positive catalysts.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: PLTR $112.93에 마감하며 모든 이평선 아래 분배 Stage2 0/7 RS 0.0. 52주 고점 $207.59 대비 45.6% 심각한 손상. 일본 방산 AI 계약 검토와 마이클 버리 숏커버 보도에 따른 신규 촉매.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MU closed at $1,132.33 above all EMAs with golden cross and Stage2 6/7 RS 100.0 in uptrend. 9.8% below 52-week high of $1,255.35 but post close at $1,131.00 after sharp -6.69% move. Profit-taking and sell-the-news reaction amid sector rotation and volatility frustration.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: CRWD closed at $701.09 above all EMAs with golden cross and Stage2 7/7 RS 100.0 in confirmed uptrend. 10.8% below 52-week high of $785.98 with volume contraction near key level. Traders watching for $700 breakout with AI cybersecurity leadership focus.

symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Bear flag warning despite uptrend structure
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Break and hold above $701.09 for extension

symbol_briefs.brief_en: AMZN closed at $232.69 below EMAs in distribution with Stage2 3/7 and RS 52.9. 16.5% below 52-week high of $278.67 near EMA200 $234.11. Buy-the-dip sentiment dominates citing strong AWS growth and AI infrastructure progress.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MSFT closed at $372.97 below EMAs with Stage2 0/7 and RS 29.0 despite uptrend label. 32.3% below 52-week high of $550.92 shows major damage. AI momentum via Copilot growth and enterprise moat with attractive valuation noted in optimistic sentiment.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: AAPL closed at $283.78 below EMAs with Stage2 4/7 and RS 47.8 in uptrend. 10.6% below 52-week high of $317.43 near EMA200 $267.79. Price hikes on Macs and iPads sparked initial selloff but conversation shifted to analyst support.

symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: EMA21 $294.40 resistance limits near term upside

symbol_briefs.brief_en: GOOGL closed at $337.39 below EMAs in downtrend with Stage2 5/7 and RS 65.6. 17.4% below 52-week high of $408.46 with RSI bullish divergence noted. High-volume pullback discussed with mixed technical views and Monday Dow inclusion catalyst.
